note: Sprint 5.6: Trinity Autonomous Orchestrator v0.1. Pipeline is dry-run only — registered=false, ready_to_register=false, no_rewards_active=true, no_paid_providers=true, no_network_calls=true. Determinism: bundle SHA 4e03178c1c226698fa6dbdc4eda2b4482e460eea7525492f8bd86cdfe2a79373 with seed trinity-autonomy-v0.1 + pinned 2026-05-11. Tests: 72 new in tests/trinity/test_{trinity_orchestrator_determinism,useful_compute_reward_model,useful_compute_request_schema,trinity_error_memory,geo_materials_bridge,no_network_by_default,no_public_claims,static_safety_surface}.py; full trinity suite 198/198 PASS with real council, 70 SKIP without. No consensus, RPC, node, miner, wallet or wire-format change.
